channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Raptors Prepare for Early Game Start in Playoff Series Against Cavaliers
item.description: The Toronto Raptors are adjusting to an unusual early tipoff for Game 4 of their playoff series against the Cleveland Cavaliers. With Game 3 behind them, where they secured a 126-104 win, Toronto face...

item.title: Global Rhapathon 2026 to focus on evangelism and global outreach with Pastor Chris
item.description: Millions of Christians across the world dey prepare for Rhapathon 2026, one major five-day global programme wey go run from May 4 to May 8, 2026, under the leadership of Pastor Chris Oyakhilome. The p...

item.title: Yusuf Tuggar Officially Joins Bauchi Governorship Race for 2027
item.description: Former Minister of Foreign Affairs, Yusuf Maitama Tuggar, don officially declare say e go contest Bauchi State governorship election under the All Progressives Congress (APC) for 2027. For one big gat...

item.title: Trump escorted from White House Correspondents' Dinner after suspicious noise
item.description: Former President Donald Trump was swiftly evacuated from the White House Correspondents' Dinner on the evening of April 25, 2026, following a sudden disturbance. Secret Service agents rushed to the st...

item.title: Teenager Loses Life in Delhi Road Accident Involving Tempo
item.description: In a tragic incident in Delhi, a 15-year-old boy lost his life after a speeding tempo collided with his bike. The police reported that the accident occurred when the tempo, allegedly moving at high sp...

item.title: Co-ordinated militant attacks across Mali mark major escalation in ongoing insurgency
item.description: Mali experienced one of its most significant security crises in recent years as co-ordinated attacks struck multiple locations, including areas near the capital, Bamako. The assaults were claimed by J...

item.title: Mashatile's Focus on Service Delivery and Governance Amid Election Talk

item.title: Alan Cumming returns as Nightcrawler in 'Avengers: Doomsday' after 20 years
item.description: Actor Alan Cumming has expressed his excitement about returning to the role of Nightcrawler in the upcoming film *Avengers: Doomsday*. After more than two decades since his last portrayal of the telep...

item.title: Report Details Alleged Iranian Attacks on US Military Bases in the Gulf
item.description: A recent report has sparked concern and speculation regarding alleged attacks on US military bases in the Gulf region, reportedly carried out by Iran. While details remain scarce and the veracity of t...

item.title: Labour MPs express concern over electoral impact of lowering voting age to 16
item.description: Several Labour MPs are urging Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer to delay plans to lower the voting age to 16, amid concerns that the policy could unintentionally benefit the Green Party. The proposal, w...

item.title: What I learned from trying 47 hobbies to find connection beyond dating apps
item.description: In this opinion piece, the author reflects on ditching dating apps—described as frustrating and superficial—in favour of meeting people through real-world hobbies. After growing disillusioned with onl...

item.title: KL Rahul Sets New IPL Record with Stunning 152-Run Innings
item.description: Delhi Capitals' wicketkeeper-batter KL Rahul absolutely smashed the record books in a phenomenal IPL performance. He became the first Indian cricketer to score over 150 runs in an IPL innings, putting...

item.title: Police Confirm One Officer Dead and Another Injured in Chicago Hospital Shooting
item.description: A tragic shooting at a Chicago hospital has left one police officer dead and another in critical condition. The incident occurred on April 25, 2026, in what authorities are calling an ongoing investig...

item.title: Four Tornadoes Hit California's Central Valley in a Single Day
item.description: On April 22, 2026, California’s Central Valley experienced a highly unusual weather event when four tornadoes touched down within a five-hour period. The first tornado was reported near Biola around 2...

item.title: Selling Gift Cards in Nigeria: A Guide to Safe and Reliable Options
item.description: The article provides a guide for Nigerians looking to sell unwanted gift cards. It initially discusses the risks associated with informal channels like selling to friends or using unreliable online pl...

item.title: Uncertainty surrounding fugitive Zaldy Co’s status in the Czech Republic

item.title: Niti Aayog sees major reshuffle with Ashok Lahiri as vice-chairman and four new members
item.description: The Government of India has carried out the most significant reorganisation of Niti Aayog since its establishment in 2015. Ashok Lahiri has been appointed as the new vice-chairman, alongside four fres...

item.title: Zelensky Signs Defence and Energy Agreements with Azerbaijan as Death Toll from Russian Attacks Climbs
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has signed new agreements with Azerbaijan, focused on military-industrial and energy cooperation, as part of ongoing efforts to bolster Ukraine's defence capabil...

item.title: Survey Shows Many Australian Teens Still Access Social Media Despite Age Ban
item.description: Australia implemented a social media ban restricting users under 16, but early reports suggest it is not fully effective. A recent survey conducted by the UK-based Molly Rose Foundation, which include...

item.title: New Skin Renewal Treatment Introduced for Busy Professionals
item.description: A new skin renewal treatment has been launched in the Philippines, aimed at career-oriented individuals who are looking for long-term skin health rather than instant results. The treatment, offered by...
